featured.headline: An Indian Billionaire Was Targeted by Trump. Then He Poured Money Into a Startup Secretly Backed by Donald Trump Jr.
featured.dek: ProPublica exposes how political targeting can be quietly reversed through family business connections, showing how the system works for those with money and access.
